baselineEvents.detail: Morning sync loaded client, wall, work order, ESG and commercial records.
Risk queue includes low-light, water swing and gateway heartbeat exceptions.

controls.label: Action trace
controls.rule: Every operational control action creates a timestamped audit event.

controls.label: Client evidence
controls.rule: Report exports include audit event counts for the selected client.

controls.label: Review discipline
controls.rule: Sensor alerts, proof approval, stock reorder and work order closure must be attributable.
